text:
Change

* take maintainership
* update PORTVERSION to 6.0.4
* Added 3 files to pkg-plist. Because checking the check-orphans cursed for errors because of them.
* portlint > looks fine.
* portclippy and portfmt checks
* build in jail 13.1-RELEASE-p6 amd64 was successful. I didn't run the program after build for testing!
